tool.name: water
tool.summary: Compute deterministic local pairwise alignment between exactly one query and one target record

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: `water` computes one deterministic Smith-Waterman-style local pairwise alignment between exactly one query record and one target record. Epithema v1 reports only the highest-scoring local region and renders the primary payload as Stockholm.

sections.title: Inputs
sections.content: The current interface accepts two singleton sequence inputs plus optional gap penalties. Multi-record query or target inputs are rejected clearly. Default scoring mirrors the governed Epithema pairwise defaults: nucleotide mode uses match=1 mismatch=-1 gap_open=5 gap_extend=1, while protein mode uses match=2 mismatch=-1 gap_open=8 gap_extend=1.

sections.title: Outputs
sections.content: The result payload is a pairwise local alignment with stable row order `query` then `target`. The CLI renders the payload as Stockholm, and the summary records score, aligned length, identity, the aligned spans on the original query and target sequences, and the effective gap penalties.

sections.title: Legacy Context
sections.content: This first governed `water` contract keeps one historical-style local alignment invocation in view and exercises the Epithema v1 local-alignment core against committed fixtures with internal matching regions. It does not claim surface parity with the broader historical EMBOSS parameter set.

sections.title: Current Status
sections.content: This method is implemented and exposed through `epithema water`. Current Rust service coverage exercises committed singleton FASTA fixtures and locks down the highest-scoring local match plus the reported query and target spans.

sections.title: Caveats
sections.content: The first release is intentionally narrow. `water` requires exactly one query and one target record, reports only the single highest-scoring local alignment, and returns a validation error when no positive-scoring local alignment exists.

artifacts.label: Water query FASTA fixture
artifacts.description: Repository-managed singleton query fixture containing a local internal nucleotide match.

artifacts.label: Water target FASTA fixture
artifacts.description: Repository-managed singleton target fixture containing the corresponding highest-scoring local nucleotide region.

examples.title: Compute one deterministic local nucleotide alignment
examples.description: Aligns the committed singleton query and target fixtures with the v1 default nucleotide scoring model and returns the highest-scoring local region as Stockholm plus stable query/target span reporting.

expected_outputs.label: Pairwise Stockholm alignment
expected_outputs.description: A stable Stockholm rendering covering only the best local aligned region.

expected_outputs.label: Local span summary
expected_outputs.description: A stable textual summary reporting the 1-based inclusive query and target spans of the retained local region.
